title: helianthemum variabile var. pilosum
intro: Helianthemum variabile var. pilosum, also known as rockrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. Traditionally, rockrose has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving wound healing, and supporting cardiovascular health. Rockrose can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in topical applications for skin issues and minor injuries.
